features.name: Festival edition data model
features.description: New yi_connect.festival_editions table + events.festival_edition_id FK for evergreen multi-year grouping. No other new tables.
test_steps: Apply migration 20260622000001 to a non-prod DB
Insert a 2026 edition row, link a test event via festival_edition_id
Confirm anon SELECT returns only status in (live, completed)

features.name: Branded vertical shell
features.description: app/varnam-vizha layout (bilingual Tamil+English fonts, festival colours), brand header/footer, landing page.
test_steps: Visit /varnam-vizha → branded hero renders with Tamil wordmark
Header/footer show festival identity, not yi-connect default chrome

features.name: Auth gate (app='varnam')
features.description: lib/varnam/auth/access.ts over yi_directory.role_assignments; Forbidden403 explicit-deny; gated dashboard stub.
test_steps: With an app='varnam' role → dashboard stub renders with role + tier

features.name: Public site (data-driven)
features.description: Home, events list, public event page, schedule, sponsors wall — reading the current edition + its sub-events. Bilingual.
test_steps: Seeded 2026 edition + sample events render on /varnam-vizha/events
Native Tamil review of all visible copy before launch

features.name: Registration & ticketing
features.description: Reuse quick_rsvp token + event_custom_forms for per-event registration; confirmation/pass; member + guest paths. Payment-gateway-ready (no payment wired).
test_steps: Register on a test event end-to-end; row lands in event_rsvps
Custom form fields render + responses persist

features.name: Committee dashboard
features.description: Events, registrations, team/roles, sponsor pipeline, budget/P&L over reused CRM + finance modules, festival-scoped.
test_steps: Each module visible to the right role; explicit 403 for others
Sponsor pipeline + budget rollup scoped to the edition

features.name: Digital Playbook + history seed
features.description: Seed 2021–2026 editions, event templates, contact directory, lessons from the Obsidian vault.
test_steps: Past editions browsable; templates + contacts present
Reconcile public.events vs yi_connect.events historical Varnam rows

features.name: Polish, bilingual pass & custom domain
features.description: Gallery/media, full Tamil/English i18n with native review, custom domain via middleware host-rewrite, PWA manifest scoped to /varnam-vizha.
test_steps: Custom domain serves /varnam-vizha (once domain name decided)
All Tamil copy native-reviewed; PWA installs scoped
